issue_title: Add a check so JsonGenerator.writeString() won't work if writeFieldName() expected.
issue_description: Looks like calling writeString() (and perhaps other scalar write methods) results in writing invalid output, instead of throwing an exception. It should instead fail; in future we may want to consider allowing this as an alias, but at any rate it should not produce invalid output.
